title: Timothée Chalamet Thanks Kylie Jenner, Wins Best Actor at Critics Choice Awards
text: Timothée Chalamet's Critics Choice Awards Speech. Timothée Chalamet scored his first win of the 2026 awards season, taking home the award for best actor at the 2026 Critics Choice Awards. He won for his role as aspiring ping-pong champion Marty Mauser in Marty Supreme. During his acceptance speech, Chalamet took time to honor his longtime girlfriend, Kylie Jenner, saying Thank you to my partner for three years and expressing that he couldn't do this without you when accepting the best actor trophy. When accepting the Best Actor award for Marty Supreme, Chalamet publicly acknowledged his girlfriend Kylie Jenner, stating: Thank you to my partner for three years. I love you. I couldn't do this without you. He also expressed gratitude to director Josh Safdie, praising how the filmmaker crafted a story about a flawed protagonist without preaching to audiences. Chalamet admitted feeling unexpectedly nervous during his acceptance remarks. Chalamet was nominated alongside Leonardo DiCaprio for One Battle After Another, Joel Edgerton for Train Dreams, Ethan Hawke for Blue Moon, Michael B. Jordan for Sinners and Wagner Moura for The Secret Agent.
